seoTitle: Import Data From Databricks Into Power BI Desktop
metaDescription: Learn how to connect Databricks to Power BI Desktop and import your data for richer analytics and real-time reporting dashboards.
intro: Connecting Databricks to Power BI Desktop lets you bring large-scale data directly into your reports for deeper analysis. This guide covers preparing your Databricks data and importing it into Power BI so you can visualize it effectively.

steps.heading: Get an overview of Databricks and Power BI
steps.body: Understand how the two platforms work together, with Databricks handling large-scale data processing and Power BI focused on visualization and reporting.

steps.heading: Prepare your Databricks data
steps.body: Make sure your data in Databricks is organized and ready to be queried before attempting to connect it to Power BI.

steps.heading: Connect Databricks to Power BI
steps.body: Use Power BI Desktop's connector to establish a connection to your Databricks workspace, entering the required connection details.

steps.heading: Visualize imported data
steps.body: Once connected, bring your Databricks data into report visuals, building dashboards that reflect your large-scale datasets.

steps.heading: Plan your next steps
steps.body: Consider setting up refresh schedules or automation so your Power BI reports stay aligned with the latest data in Databricks.

faq.question: Do I need special permissions to connect Databricks to Power BI?
faq.answer: Yes, you'll typically need the appropriate access credentials and permissions within your Databricks workspace to establish the connection.

faq.question: Can I set up automatic refreshes for Databricks data in Power BI?
faq.answer: Yes, once connected, you can configure scheduled refreshes so your report stays up to date with the latest Databricks data.

faq.question: Is this integration suitable for real-time analytics?
faq.answer: It can support near real-time reporting depending on your refresh configuration and how frequently your Databricks data updates.

faq.question: Is connecting Databricks to Power BI difficult for beginners?
faq.answer: The connection process is straightforward once you understand the basic steps, making it accessible even for those new to both platforms.
